page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Shinji Ikari Raising Project Official Visual Book
text:
is an artbook for Neon Genesis Evangelion: Shinji Ikari Raising Project video game by Comptiq Editorial Department. It was published by Kadokawa Shoten on 29 October 2004. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4047071617 

Overview

A large amount of image illustrations, character and event CG original illustrations, including illustrations drawn for the Comptiq magazine. Complete with Shinji's training schedule, EVA & Angel data, story branching conditions & CG complete information. Character designer Kengo Yonekura and voice actors interviews are also included.

Table of Contents

Editions

ISBN-10: ISBN 4047071617
ISBN-13: ISBN 978-4047071612
